author: doll-agent
content: Phase-1 long tail #693 delivered: meshgrid (varargs + indexing='xy'/'ij'), mgrid (call form with [(start,stop,step)] tuples since Python slice syntax doesn't translate to fn call), ogrid (sparse open mesh), vander (Vandermonde matrix, numeric dtypes via match_dtype_numeric — no bool). 525/525 still passing. mgrid/ogrid slice-syntax sugar (np.mgrid[0:5,0:3]) deferred — would need an MGridIndexer Python class with __getitem__.
